info.title: Chores API
info.description: REST API for managing household chores, assignments, and tracking

get.description: Check if initial setup is needed (no users in database).

post.description:
Login with username and password.

If no users exist in the database, the first login auto-creates the user as admin.
Returns 403 with a short-lived reset token if the user must change their password.
Logs login_succeeded or login_failed to auth_log.
Logout by invalidating the JWT token.

put.description: Change password for authenticated user (requires old password).

Reset password using a short-lived reset token (no old password required).

Accepts the reset token issued in the 403 response from POST /auth/login
when requires_password_reset is True. Clears the flag on success and issues
a normal JWT.

get.description:
Get auth event log. Admin only.

Filter by username, action (login_succeeded, login_failed, password_changed,
password_reset, user_created), start_date, end_date.

schema.title: Response Get Auth Log V1 Auth Log Get

get.description:
Get all chores.

Returns a list of all chores with computed fields:
- age: days overdue (negative = future due date)
- schedule_summary: human-readable schedule description
- next_assignee: next person in rotation (for rotating chores)

schema.title: Response List Chores V1 Chores Get

get.description: Get a single chore by ID.

schema.title: Response List People V1 People Get
Response Get Redemption History V1 People  Person Id  Redemptions Get

get.description: 7-day and 30-day point totals for every person, in one query.

schema.title: Response Points Summary V1 Points Summary Get
Response Person History V1 Points  Person  Get
Response Get Log V1 Log Get

get.description: Get the current update check status (admin only).

post.description: Manually trigger an update check (admin only).

schema.title: Response List Themes V1 Theme List Get

get.description: Return the current site-wide default theme (admin only).
Return the site-wide default theme name and id. Accessible to all authenticated users.

delete.description: Clear the current user's personal theme preference so they inherit the site default.

put.description: Set the site-wide default theme (admin only).

post.description: Set the personal theme preference for the current user.

get.description:
Export configuration data (chores, people, settings).
Does not include history logs or computed scores.

post.description:
Import configuration data (people, chores, settings).
Uses replace strategy: clears existing data and imports from backup.

get.description: Paginated list of PointsLog rows, newest first.

patch.description:
Edit points and/or person on a PointsLog row.

Computes the delta and applies it to Person.points.
Writes a ChoreLog audit entry.

delete.description:
Delete a PointsLog row.

Reverses points on Person (floor at 0).
Writes a ChoreLog audit entry.

get.description:
Check database readiness status.

Returns current database state (initializing/ready/error) and migration progress.
Used by frontend to detect when database startup/migrations are complete.

PasswordResetRequired.title: PasswordResetRequired
PasswordResetRequired.description: Returned as the body of a 403 when requires_password_reset is True.

ThemeCurrentOut.title: ThemeCurrentOut
ThemeCurrentOut.description: Extended theme response for /theme/current that includes personal preference flag.

ThemeDefaultInfo.title: ThemeDefaultInfo
ThemeDefaultInfo.description: Lightweight default theme info accessible to all authenticated users.
